description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped corrugated cardboard box with two flaps on opposite sides standing upright and two flaps folded outward. The box is brown with a visible zigzag corrugation pattern along the top edge, indicating its layered construction. On one side, there are printed handling symbols, including 'this side up', 'fragile', and 'keep dry', suggesting it is used for shipping or storage of sensitive items. The interior is empty, and the box appears lightweight and easy to carry. The surface is matte and slightly rough, typical of standard cardboard packaging. The box is suitable for use in urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or delivery areas.
description: A brown, open corrugated cardboard box with two upright and two outward-folded flaps, featuring shipping symbols on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open box with two flaps upright and two folded outward, plus visible shipping symbols.
description_view_1: Side view with the box's depth visible, showing the zigzag corrugation and no visible symbols.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without any printed symbols, showing the open interior and flaps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the box's depth and corrugated edge, no symbols visible.
